process.title: Process
process.subtitle: The Work Journey
process.desc: From raw data to defensible results in 6 steps. Clear, predictable, and rigorous.
process.s1.title: Upload Data
process.s1.desc: Securely upload your datasets. We sign strict NDAs for every project to ensure 100% privacy.
process.s2.title: Sanity Check
process.s2.desc: We perform a free initial validation to ensure your data is clean and ready for analysis before you pay.
process.s3.title: Secure Payment
process.s3.desc: Once validated, process payment securely to officially kickstart the deep analysis phase.
process.s4.title: Deep Analysis
process.s4.desc: Rigorous cleaning, hypothesis testing, and regression modeling performed by senior biostatisticians.
process.s5.title: 10-Day Delivery
process.s5.desc: Receive publication-ready tables (APA style), high-res graphs, and a full methodology report.
process.s6.title: Success
process.s6.desc: You submit your thesis with confidence, supported by defensible, accurate results.
footer.tagline: Providing defensible, high-accuracy statistical analysis for researchers, students, and institutions.
services.title: Our
services.s1.title: Statistical Consulting
services.s1.desc: Expert guidance on research design, methodology, and data strategy.
services.s2.title: Data Analysis
services.s2.desc: Comprehensive cleaning, processing, and advanced modeling of your data.
services.s3.title: Meta-Analysis
services.s3.desc: Comprehensive meta-analytical synthesis of systematic reviews and comparative studies to derive pooled estimates and robust conclusions.
services.custom.title: Need a custom solution?
services.custom.desc: We handle everything from simple surveys to complex clinical trials. Talk to us about your specific research needs.
about.title: About
about.p1: Naggar Analytics is a leading provider of high-accuracy statistical analysis services. We specialize in helping researchers, students, and institutions turn raw data into defensible, publication-ready results.
about.p2: Our team of senior biostatisticians ensures that every project meets the highest standards of academic and professional rigor.
contact.title: Contact
contact.inquiryDesc: Have a project in mind? Let's discuss how we can help you with your data.
contact.sendDesc: For the fastest service, please log in and open a new request directly in your dashboard.
faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: How long does the analysis take?
faq.a1: Standard analysis projects are delivered within 10 business days.
faq.a2: Yes, we prioritize data privacy and sign strict NDAs for every project.
faq.q3: Which citation styles do you support?
faq.a3: We primary support APA, but can adapt to Vancouver, MLA, or Harvard styles.
faq.q4: What statistical software do you use?
faq.a4: We use SPSS, R, STATA, and Python depending on the project requirements.
careers.title: Join Our
careers.desc: We're building a team of passionate data professionals committed to delivering rigorous, high-quality statistical analysis. All roles are fully remote.
careers.whyJoin: Why do you want to join Naggar Analytics?
careers.whyPlaceholder: Tell us what motivates you to join our team and how you can contribute...
careers.submittedMsg: Thank you for applying. We'll be in touch soon.

audience.business.title: For Business & Institutions
portfolio.title: Selected
portfolioPage.title: Our
portfolioPage.desc: Real projects. Real insights. Every case study below reflects genuine analysis delivered to our clients.
portfolioPage.confidentialDesc: All data shared in this portfolio is mimic / simulated data that replicates the structure and statistical properties of the original datasets. We maintain the highest standards of client confidentiality. No real client data is disclosed.
portfolioPage.ctaDesc: We'd love to discuss how we can turn your raw data into defensible, publication-ready results.
portfolioPage.haramain.title: Haramain Train Stations
portfolioPage.haramain.desc: A comprehensive statistical analysis of climatic conditions across Haramain high-speed railway stations in Mecca. The study examined temperature, humidity, wind patterns, and other environmental variables to support operational and safety decisions.
haramain.overviewP1: This project involved a comprehensive statistical analysis of climatic conditions across the Haramain high-speed railway stations in the Mecca region. The study aimed to provide actionable insights to support station operations, safety planning, and environmental compliance.
haramain.overviewP2: Key climatic variables — including temperature extremes, humidity levels, wind speed distributions, and UV exposure — were analyzed across multiple stations and time periods to identify patterns, seasonal trends, and anomalies.
haramain.galleryEmpty: Project photos will appear here once uploaded.
haramain.downloadDesc: A simulated dataset mirroring the structure and statistical properties of the original data is available for download. This allows researchers and students to explore the analysis methods used.
haramain.confidentialDesc: All data shared in this case study is mimic / simulated data that replicates the statistical structure of the original dataset. We uphold the highest standards of client transparency and confidentiality — no real operational data is disclosed.
portfolioPage.psoriasis.title: Kuwaiti Psoriasis Registry
portfolioPage.psoriasis.desc: A comprehensive epidemiological study of psoriasis prevalence and clinical characteristics across Kuwait. The analysis examined disease patterns, treatment outcomes, and patient demographics to support clinical practice guidelines.
portfolioPage.vitaminD.title: Vitamin D Deficiency in Riyadh
portfolioPage.vitaminD.desc: An in-depth analysis of vitamin D deficiency prevalence and risk factors among the population of Riyadh. The study investigated serum vitamin D levels, demographic correlations, and seasonal variations to inform public health interventions.
onboarding.step1.title: Academic Details
onboarding.step1.subtitle: Please provide your degree and research title details to start your project.
onboarding.step1.thesisTitleError: Research title must contain at least 3 words
onboarding.step2.title: Upload Files
onboarding.step2.subtitle: Please upload your raw data (Excel/CSV) and any supporting documents such as survey questionnaires.
onboarding.step2.uploadDesc: Or drag and drop files here. Maximum 100 MB per file, up to 5 files total.
onboarding.step2.filesRequired: At least one file is required
onboarding.step3.title: Required Services
onboarding.step3.subtitle: Select the statistical services you need. Prices are estimated ranges — your final quote will be based on data complexity.
onboarding.step3.cleaningDesc: Handle missing values, outliers, and data restructuring
onboarding.step3.descriptiveDesc: Frequency tables, charts, and summary statistics
onboarding.step3.metaAnalysisDesc: Systematic review synthesis, forest plots, heterogeneity analysis
onboarding.step3.writingDesc: APA-style results chapter, interpretation, and discussion
onboarding.step3.pricingNote: Final price set after we review your data
onboarding.step3.quoteExplanation: These are estimated price ranges. After you submit, our team will review your data and send you a precise quote based on the effort required, statistical tests needed, and data cleanliness. No payment is required until the quote is approved.
onboarding.step5.title: Review & Submit
onboarding.step5.subtitle: Review your project details below. No payment is needed now — we'll send you a quote after reviewing your data.
onboarding.step5.nextStep1: Our team reviews your data and assesses complexity (24-48 hours)
onboarding.step5.nextStep2: You receive a precise quote based on the actual work required
onboarding.step5.nextStep3: Once you approve and pay, we start the analysis immediately
onboarding.step5.successMsg: Your project has been submitted for review. Our team will assess your data and send you a precise quote within 24-48 hours.
onboarding.step5.successStep2: You'll receive a precise quote via email
onboarding.step5.successStep3: Analysis begins after quote approval & payment
onboarding.step5.errorMsg: Failed to submit project. Please try again.
onboarding.step2.fileSizeError: File size must not exceed 100 MB
onboarding.step2.note: For larger datasets (>500 MB), please upload to Google Drive and share the link below.
onboarding.step2.googleDriveLabel: Paste your Google Drive sharing link
onboarding.step2.googleDriveError: Please enter a valid Google Drive link
onboarding.pageSubtitle: Complete the following steps to submit your project details and we'll start the analysis right away.
onboarding.step2nda.title: Non-Disclosure Agreement
onboarding.step2nda.subtitle: Please review and sign our NDA before uploading your data. Your research is safe with us.
onboarding.step2nda.trustBadge: Your data is protected by a legally binding confidentiality agreement. We never share or disclose any client data.
onboarding.step2nda.ndaIntro: This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between Naggar Analytics ("Service Provider") and the undersigned client ("Client") to protect confidential research data and proprietary information shared during the course of statistical analysis services.
onboarding.step2nda.clause1Body: "Confidential Information" includes all data files, research documents, survey responses, datasets, thesis content, academic materials, and any other information provided by the Client for analysis purposes, regardless of format (digital or physical).
onboarding.step2nda.clause2Body: Naggar Analytics agrees to: (a) maintain strict confidentiality of all Client data; (b) use the information solely for the purpose of providing the requested statistical analysis services; (c) not disclose, publish, or share the data with any third party without prior written consent; (d) implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect the data.
onboarding.step2nda.clause3Body: All client data will be stored on secure, encrypted servers. Upon project completion and final delivery, the Client may request permanent deletion of all uploaded files. Naggar Analytics will retain no copies after deletion is confirmed.
onboarding.step2nda.clause4Body: All research data, findings, and intellectual property remain the sole property of the Client. Naggar Analytics claims no ownership over the data or results produced, and will not use the data for internal research, publications, or marketing without explicit written consent.
onboarding.step2nda.clause5Body: This Agreement remains in effect indefinitely from the date of signing and survives the termination of any service engagement. This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable international data protection standards.
onboarding.step2nda.signaturePlaceholder: Type your full name to sign...
onboarding.step2nda.signatureError: Name must be at least 3 characters
onboarding.step2nda.agreeText: I have read and understood the Non-Disclosure Agreement above. I agree to be bound by its terms and authorize Naggar Analytics to process my data under these conditions.
